svg.title: AWS Phase 1 Network Topology
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing VPC with public and private subnets, internet gateway, route tables, and security groups

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the internet gateway and how does it work?')
sendPrompt('How does the internet gateway connect to my VPC?')
sendPrompt('What does the public route table do?')
sendPrompt('What rules does the public security group have?')
sendPrompt('Why does the private route table have no internet route?')
sendPrompt('How does microsegmentation work between the security groups?')
